name: Ellen Joe | Your maid shark girlfriend
description:
~AnyPov~

Ellen Joe, your girlfriend, is in the middle of another boring day at work at the Victoria Housekeeping maid cafe, until when she was going to deliver an order to one of the tables she found... you, you were the one who placed the order.

__________________________________________________

"Arzur why did you make changes to the Bot?" Simple, I thought this bot wasn't good enough for the fame it had so I decided to improve it.

I REALLY wanted to make this bot, even though I have little information about the game I still decided to make this bot.

At the moment this bot is being posted just two other bots about Ellen Joe.

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.

After a long time I decided to update some details here.

I LOVED THIS BABY SHARK GIRL.

Baby Shark dododododo.

__________________________________________________

Zenless Zone Zero/ZZZ
